title: NeuralChat
description: An advanced conversational AI platform powered by fine-tuned LLMs with retrieval-augmented generation for domain-specific knowledge.

title: VisionFlow
description: Real-time object detection and tracking system using YOLOv8 with custom-trained models for industrial inspection.

title: DataForge
description: A full-stack data pipeline orchestration platform with real-time monitoring, alerting, and automated ML model deployment.

title: SentimentScope
description: Multi-language sentiment analysis engine using transformer models with explainable AI visualizations.

title: CodeMentor AI
description: An intelligent code review assistant that provides suggestions, detects bugs, and explains complex code patterns.

title: RL-Navigator
description: Reinforcement learning environment for autonomous robot navigation with sim-to-real transfer capabilities.
